goal: Update documentation to reflect that the LiteLLM proxy (proxy container) no longer has direct external network access — egress is now exclusively via caddy-sidecar:8081 → api.anthropic.com.

tasks.name: Update CONTEXT.md architecture ASCII diagram
tasks.action: In the ASCII architecture diagram, change the proxy line from `├─> proxy:4000 (LiteLLM) ──> Anthropic API` to `├─> proxy:4000 (LiteLLM) ──> caddy-sidecar:8081 ──> Anthropic API` to reflect that the proxy no longer connects directly to the internet.
tasks.verify: Read docs/CONTEXT.md and confirm the diagram shows proxy routing through caddy-sidecar, not directly to Anthropic API.
tasks.done: The ASCII diagram in CONTEXT.md shows proxy → caddy-sidecar:8081 → Anthropic API.

tasks.name: Update CONTEXT.md container table for proxy row
tasks.action: In the 'Six containers' table, update the proxy row description from just 'LiteLLM gateway, holds real ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' to note that it is on int_net only and egresses exclusively via caddy-sidecar:8081 (no direct internet access).
tasks.verify: Read docs/CONTEXT.md and confirm the proxy row in the container table reflects int_net-only placement and caddy-mediated egress.
tasks.done: Proxy row in the CONTEXT.md container table mentions int_net only and caddy-sidecar egress.

tasks.name: Update CONTEXT.md request flow step 9
tasks.action: In the 'Request flow (/ask)' section, update step 9 from `Claude Code → ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://proxy:4000 → LiteLLM → Anthropic API` to `Claude Code → ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://proxy:4000 → LiteLLM → caddy-sidecar:8081 → Anthropic API` to show the full egress chain.
tasks.verify: Read docs/CONTEXT.md and confirm step 9 of the request flow shows the caddy-sidecar hop.
tasks.done: Request flow step 9 in CONTEXT.md shows proxy → caddy-sidecar → Anthropic API.

tasks.name: Update ARCHITECTURE.md network topology and service inventory for proxy
tasks.action: Find all references in ARCHITECTURE.md where the proxy is described as having direct internet or ext_net access, or connecting directly to api.anthropic.com. Update them to reflect: proxy is int_net only; outbound Anthropic API calls flow through caddy-sidecar:8081. Update any network topology diagrams or tables accordingly.
tasks.verify: Read docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and confirm no sections still describe the proxy with direct internet access or ext_net membership.
tasks.done: ARCHITECTURE.md consistently describes the proxy as int_net-only with egress via caddy-sidecar.
